features: A holiday classic, bursting with aromas of warm wine and sweet berries blended with the rich spiciness of cinnamon and cloves; optimal for creating a warm, welcoming ambience for those cold winter nights
Improve your home fragrance for up to 5 weeks
description: Product Description Air Wick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long lasting fragrances and improve your home fragrance for up to 5 weeks. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home whether it's in your living room or bedroom with its nature-inspired fragrance and elegant design. Air Freshener. Ingredients Contains: 3-butoxypropan-2-ol, cis-2-tert-Butylcyclohexyl acetate, 2-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, 3,5,5-trimethylhexyl acetate, Distillates (petroleum), hydrotreated light, DIETHYL MALONATE, GAMMA-UNDECALACTONE, BENZOPHENONE-3, alpha-Methylcinnamaldehyde, DIHYDROEUGENOL, EUCALYPTOL, 1-(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8-Octahydro2,3,8,8-tetramethyl-2-naphthalenyl) ethanone, CINNAMYL ALCOHOL, CINNAMAL, ,4-DIMETHYL-3-CYCLOHEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE, Dimethylcyclohex-3-ene1-carbaldehyde (isomer mixture), ALLYL HEPTANOATE, EUGENOL, ETHYL METHYLPHENYLGLYCIDATE, Piperonal Directions [GENERAL] Fill the diffuser with water, add appropriate essential oils, and follow the manufacturer-specific instructions for operation. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
